title: Conceptual And Theoretical Frameworks Of Educational Digitalisation In Primary And Secondary Education: A Scoping Review Protocol (V.2)
author: Arriazu Muñoz, Telmo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document presents the protocol (Version 2) for a scoping review aimed at mapping and analysing the conceptualisations of educational digitalisation and the theoretical frameworks proposed in the academic literature between 2015 and 2025, within the context of formal education at primary and secondary levels. The protocol follows the PRISMA-ScR (Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses extension for Scoping Reviews) guidelines and includes the research question, eligibility criteria, information sources, and search strategies for four databases: Scopus, Web of Science Core Collection, ERIC, and Dialnet. It also specifies the data management procedures, predefined data extraction items, and synthesis approach. This scoping review is part of a broader doctoral research project developed at the Universidad Pública de Navarra (UPNA), which critically examines the relationship between pedagogy, learning, and educational digitalisation.

keywords: scoping review, educational digitalisation, digital transformation, theoretical frameworks, formal education, primary education, secondary education, PRISMA-ScR
